requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — NIS IEC 62133 under Mandatory SONCAP
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——强制SONCAP下的NIS IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——強制SONCAP下的NIS IEC 62133

summary.en: Portable lithium cells and battery packs (including power banks) imported into Nigeria must demonstrate safety compliance against the Nigerian Industrial Standard that adopts the IEC 62133 series (NIS IEC 62133-2 for lithium systems), as assessed under the mandatory SON Conformity Assessment Programme (SONCAP). The Standards Organisation of Nigeria adopts IEC standards as NIS, so the technical content closely tracks IEC 62133-2 abuse testing — overcharge, external short-circuit, crush, impact, drop, thermal abuse, and forced discharge. Compliance is evidenced through a SONCAP Product Certificate, which requires a conformity assessment (test report from a SON-recognised/accredited laboratory, often an ISO/IEC 17025 lab, plus where applicable factory or inspection evidence) before the related per-shipment SONCAP Certificate can be issued. The product certificate is tied to product registration and is a precondition for clearance through Lagos (Apapa/Tin Can) or Onne ports.
summary.zh: 进口至尼日利亚的便携式锂电芯及电池组（含移动电源），须依据采用IEC 62133系列的尼日利亚工业标准（锂系统适用NIS IEC 62133-2）证明安全合规，并在强制性SON合格评定计划（SONCAP）下评定。尼日利亚标准组织将IEC标准采纳为NIS，技术内容与IEC 62133-2滥用测试高度一致——过充、外部短路、挤压、撞击、跌落、热滥用及强制放电。合规通过SONCAP产品证书体现，该证书须以合格评定（由SON认可/认可的实验室，通常为ISO/IEC 17025实验室出具的测试报告，并在适用时提供工厂或检验证据）为依据，方可签发相应的每批次SONCAP证书。产品证书与产品注册关联，是经拉各斯（Apapa/Tin Can）或Onne港口清关的前提条件。
summary.zht: 進口至奈及利亞的便攜式鋰電芯及電池組（含行動電源），須依據採用IEC 62133系列的奈及利亞工業標準（鋰系統適用NIS IEC 62133-2）證明安全合規，並在強制性SON合格評定計劃（SONCAP）下評定。奈及利亞標準組織將IEC標準採納為NIS，技術內容與IEC 62133-2濫用測試高度一致——過充、外部短路、擠壓、撞擊、跌落、熱濫用及強制放電。合規透過SONCAP產品證書體現，該證書須以合格評定（由SON認可的實驗室，通常為ISO/IEC 17025實驗室出具的測試報告，並在適用時提供工廠或檢驗證據）為依據，方可簽發相應的每批次SONCAP證書。產品證書與產品登記關聯，是經拉各斯（Apapa/Tin Can）或Onne港口清關的前提條件。

standards_or_laws: NIS IEC 62133-2 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries — Lithium systems (adopted by SON)
SON Conformity Assessment Programme (SONCAP) — mandatory Product Certificate plus per-shipment SONCAP Certificate

summary.en: China's primary safety standard for portable lithium battery packs is GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment), with GB 18287 applicable to mobile phone lithium-ion batteries. GB 31241 is technically derived from the IEC 62133 series but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria, and Chinese test reports are issued against GB rather than NIS. A GB 31241 report from a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory is the domestic baseline, but it is not, by itself, a SONCAP-recognised conformity document; SONCAP assessment is conducted against NIS IEC 62133 by SON-recognised conformity assessment bodies.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求），手机锂离子电池适用GB 18287。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133系列，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差，且中国测试报告依据GB而非NIS出具。由中国CNAS认可实验室出具的GB 31241报告是国内基准，但其本身并非SONCAP认可的合格评定文件；SONCAP评定由SON认可的合格评定机构依据NIS IEC 62133进行。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求），手機鋰離子電池適用GB 18287。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133系列，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差，且中國測試報告依據GB而非NIS出具。由中國CNAS認可實驗室出具的GB 31241報告是國內基準，但其本身並非SONCAP認可的合格評定文件；SONCAP評定由SON認可的合格評定機構依據NIS IEC 62133進行。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: Because both Nigeria and China ultimately reference the IEC 62133 series, the underlying test content overlaps substantially; the gap is procedural and document-based rather than purely technical. Key gaps: (1) Nigeria requires conformity assessment against NIS IEC 62133-2 leading to a SONCAP Product Certificate — a GB 31241 report alone is not accepted as the certificate; (2) a SON-recognised conformity assessment body (not a generic CNAS lab) must perform or accept the testing; (3) an IEC 62133-2 / IECEE CB Scheme report with a CB certificate is often the smoothest route to SONCAP because it is internationally recognised, whereas a GB-only report may require additional/repeat testing; (4) the certificate must be obtained before each shipment so that the per-shipment SONCAP Certificate can be issued prior to arrival at Nigerian customs.
gap.zh: 由于尼日利亚和中国最终均引用IEC 62133系列，底层测试内容高度重叠；差距属于程序性和文件性，而非纯技术性。主要差距：（1）尼日利亚要求依据NIS IEC 62133-2进行合格评定并取得SONCAP产品证书——仅凭GB 31241报告不被接受作为该证书；（2）须由SON认可的合格评定机构（而非普通CNAS实验室）执行或接受测试；（3）带CB证书的IEC 62133-2/IECEE CB体系报告因获国际认可，通常是通往SONCAP最顺畅的路径，而仅有GB报告可能须额外/重复测试；（4）证书须在每批货物出货前取得，以便在到达尼日利亚海关前签发每批次SONCAP证书。
gap.zht: 由於奈及利亞和中國最終均引用IEC 62133系列，底層測試內容高度重疊；差距屬於程序性和文件性，而非純技術性。主要差距：（1）奈及利亞要求依據NIS IEC 62133-2進行合格評定並取得SONCAP產品證書——僅憑GB 31241報告不被接受作為該證書；（2）須由SON認可的合格評定機構（而非普通CNAS實驗室）執行或接受測試；（3）帶CB證書的IEC 62133-2/IECEE CB體系報告因獲國際認可，通常是通往SONCAP最順暢的路徑，而僅有GB報告可能須額外/重複測試；（4）證書須在每批貨物出貨前取得，以便在到達奈及利亞海關前簽發每批次SONCAP證書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NIS IEC 62133-2 conformity assessment under SONCAP is required before a SONCAP Product Certificate and per-shipment SONCAP Certificate can be issued; clearance through Nigerian customs is conditional on these
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under the SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Nigerian market access requires cell/pack safety conformity against NIS IEC 62133-2 assessed under the mandatory SONCAP scheme, evidenced by a SONCAP Product Certificate. Although GB 31241 and NIS IEC 62133 share IEC 62133 roots, a Chinese GB 31241 report alone is not a SONCAP conformity document. An IEC 62133-2 / IECEE CB report is generally the most efficient basis for SONCAP. Exporters should route testing through a SON-recognised conformity assessment body and obtain the Product Certificate before arranging shipments.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入尼日利亚市场须使电芯/电池组安全符合NIS IEC 62133-2，并在强制SONCAP计划下评定，以SONCAP产品证书为凭证。尽管GB 31241与NIS IEC 62133同源于IEC 62133，仅凭中国GB 31241报告并非SONCAP合格评定文件。IEC 62133-2/IECEE CB报告通常是SONCAP最高效的基础。出口商应通过SON认可的合格评定机构安排测试，并在安排出货前取得产品证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入奈及利亞市場須使電芯/電池組安全符合NIS IEC 62133-2，並在強制SONCAP計劃下評定，以SONCAP產品證書為憑證。儘管GB 31241與NIS IEC 62133同源於IEC 62133，僅憑中國GB 31241報告並非SONCAP合格評定文件。IEC 62133-2/IECEE CB報告通常是SONCAP最高效的基礎。出口商應透過SON認可的合格評定機構安排測試，並在安排出貨前取得產品證書。

source.publisher: Standards Organisation of Nigeria (SON) — SONCAP online portal
